SITE_METADATA.TITLE: Swag Store - Your One-Stop Shop for Cool Swag
SITE_METADATA.DEFAULT_META_TITLE: Swag Store - Your One-Stop Shop for Cool Swag
SITE_METADATA.DESCRIPTION: Discover the coolest swag at our online store. From trendy apparel to unique accessories, we have everything you need to express your style. Shop now and elevate your swag game!
